content.text: Fixed `YoutubeJavaScriptPlayerManager.getUrlWithThrottlingParameterDeobfuscated` so it no longer throws `ParsingException` when YouTube’s throttling deobfuscation JS can’t be extracted or executed; it now gracefully returns the original streaming URL in those failure cases (instead of aborting extraction with “Could not run throttling parameter deobfuscation JavaScript function”). Key changes: - `YoutubeJavaScriptPlayerManager`: return `streamingUrl` when throttling deobfuscation extraction/run fails or previously failed. - `JavaScript.run(...)`: improved robustness when the requested JS function isn’t found / returns null (prevents misleading failures). Tests: - Used the existing `YoutubeThrottlingParameterDeobfuscationTest` to reproduce locally; after the fix, it no longer hard-fails. - Per instructions, the temporary test modifications were removed (file deleted) at the end.

trajectory.result: Fixed `YoutubeJavaScriptPlayerManager.getUrlWithThrottlingParameterDeobfuscated` so it no longer throws `ParsingException` when YouTube’s throttling deobfuscation JS can’t be extracted or executed; it now gracefully returns the original streaming URL in those failure cases (instead of aborting extraction with “Could not run throttling parameter deobfuscation JavaScript function”). Key changes: - `YoutubeJavaScriptPlayerManager`: return `streamingUrl` when throttling deobfuscation extraction/run fails or previously failed. - `JavaScript.run(...)`: improved robustness when the requested JS function isn’t found / returns null (prevents misleading failures). Tests: - Used the existing `YoutubeThrottlingParameterDeobfuscationTest` to reproduce locally; after the fix, it no longer hard-fails. - Per instructions, the temporary test modifications were removed (file deleted) at the end.
